webservice.description: Public QA evidence dashboard — returns qa_score, belt, GLOW, and last_run timestamp for all tracked projects
webservice.auth: None — public dashboard (no Bearer token required)

outputs.projects: array — [{project, qa_score, belt, glow, last_run, run_id}]
outputs.updated_at: string — ISO 8601 timestamp of most recent sync

guarantees: Always has a 'projects' field (array, may be empty if no syncs yet)
Each project entry has belt (string: White/Yellow/Orange/Green/Blue/Black)
Response time < 2s (read-only, no LLM in path)

evidence_notes: GLOW 94 deliverable: live QA evidence API. Cem Kaner: the tool must eat its own dog food — inspector results visible in production. Public endpoint; no auth barrier to transparency.
